commands.name: export
commands.description: Download and trace a GitHub Actions workflow run, or trace a downloaded run-info folder or zip file

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: otel, otel-file, chromium, speedscope, html

options.name: --otel-protocol
options.description: OpenTelemetry protocol: grpc, http, http/protobuf [default: Grpc]

options.name: --otel-file-path
options.description: Export OpenTelemetry data to a file

options.name: --chromium-path
options.description: Export trace to Chromium format file

options.name: --speedscope-path
options.description: Export trace to Speedscope format file

options.name: --html-path
options.description: Export trace to HTML file with interactive swimlanes

options.name: --minimum-test-duration
options.description: Exclude tests shorter than this duration (e.g. 00:00:01) [default: 00:00:00]

options.name: --minimum-binlog-duration
options.description: Exclude binlog targets shorter than this duration (e.g. 00:00:01) [default: 00:00:00]

options.name: --include-binlog
options.description: Include MSBuild binlog targets/tasks in the trace [default: True]

options.name: --include-tests
options.description: Include TRX/JUnit tests in the trace [default: True]

arguments.name: workflow-run-url-or-folder
arguments.description: URL of the GitHub Actions workflow run, a downloaded run-info folder, or a zip file

commands.name: download-run-info
commands.description: Download GitHub Actions workflow run info and artifacts

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: URL of the GitHub Actions workflow run
